ValidationRule.description: Enforce the user to inform at least one email field on distribution contact creation
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND ( RecordType.DeveloperName = "Contact_DistributionContact", ISBLANK( PersonalEmail__c ), ISBLANK( Email ), ISBLANK( TeamEmail__c ), $User.BypassValidationRules__c = false )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please inform at least one email address
